title: Spicy Quinoa Bake
description: A flavorful and nutritious quinoa bake with the warmth of chilli and cozy spices. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, bring 2 cups of water to a boil.
Add quinoa and reduce heat to low. Simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the water is absorbed.
While the quinoa cooks, heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the chilli, salt, and black pepper.
Add the diced tomato and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Once the quinoa is cooked, fluff it with a fork and add it to the skillet.
Combine the quinoa mixture with the tomato mixture and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 20-25 minutes or until the top is lightly browned.
